items.title: Oratomic raises $300M to build a viable quantum computer that needs only 20K qubits
items.summary: The massive round was co-led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures.

items.title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels
items.summary: Amid signs of slowing engagement,  Netflix is reportedly considering launching "always-on" live channels, giving subscribers something to tune into 24/7.

items.title: EU threatens Meta with fines over addictive features on Facebook and Instagram

items.title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies
items.summary: A third ransomware negotiator has been jailed for helping a notorious ransomware group extort American victim companies into paying the hackers.

items.title: After Apple, India’s smartphone manufacturing boom enters new phase with Vivo JV
items.summary: Vivo's joint venture could become a template for Chinese smartphone makers in India.

items.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
items.summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

items.title: Don’t want to invest in Elon Musk? Two new ETFs explicitly exclude him
items.summary: The new exchange-traded funds exclude companies that are founded, controlled, or led by Elon Musk. That means no SpaceX or Tesla.

items.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s No. 2 role

items.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
items.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

items.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
items.summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

items.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
items.summary: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

items.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
items.summary: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

items.title: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?

items.title: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
items.summary: News publishers say OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs, escalating their lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.

items.title: Slate Auto teams up with Crayola to color its EV truck
items.summary: Slate has an answer for owners who have always want to drive a truck with bright crayon colors.

items.title: FanDuel sent a video from star athlete Bryce Harper to a customer with a gambling problem
items.summary: The video call highlights the murky relationship between professional athletes and gambling apps.

items.title: Mercor is in talks for a $20B valuation
items.summary: A new $20 billion valuation would be a giant step up from the $10 billion valuation it reached in October.
